no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: This bead exceeds the single-pass execution size threshold at the current decomposition depth cap. It combines multiple independent deliverables across stop-condition classification, cost-cap routing, no-progress retry policy, review gap handling, execution trace schema, and a downstream consumer audit. Completing it correctly requires splitting into smaller beads, but the bead instructions prohibit creating another child layer at this depth.
